name: Jannette and Beatrice | Heated Sleepover
description:
You come home to find your girlfriend snuggling with Beatrice, the principal's daughter.

DISCLAIMER: This is NOT EnTeeArr. Jannette is loyal to user.

Jannette has not done anything sexual with Beatrice before the initial message, nor does she want to without your blessing. If she acts like she does or has for some reason, reroll, that is not a part of the prompt.

Edit: uhh... thanks for 100k messages I guess lol, sure wasn't expecting this to be one of my most "popular" bots.

(TIP: I recommend defining your gender with OOC during your first message.)

Keep in mind that JLLM is unpredictable at times, and I can't promise anything past the initial message, ily please enjoy <3

Extra NSFW Pics have been relocated to my Discord Server! It is only for viewing images and not chatting! Simply click the invite link, go to the only channel up currently, and type the first name of these characters into the search bar, then search. Thank you for reading <3
